channel.title: Crowdfunding on KBC by Master BoRHeZ
channel.description: Recent content in Crowdfunding on KBC by Master BoRHeZ

item.title: Crowdfunding & Grants — Daily KBC Note (2026-03-04)
item.description:
The Power of Crowdfunding & Grants in a Knowledge-Based Economy

In today’s interconnected world, crowdfunding and grants play a crucial role in supporting innovative ideas, projects, and initiatives. These forms of financial support can help bring valuable knowledge to life, driving positive change and progress. For the Knowledge-Based Currency (KBC) movement, crowdfunding and grants are essential components that can harness the power of verifiable knowledge to address global challenges.

Overview

  • Crowdfunding: Crowdfunding is a method of raising capital through the collective effort of friends, family, customers, and individual investors. It allows individuals or organizations to present their ideas and projects to a larger audience, who can then contribute financially to bring them to fruition.

item.title: Crowdfunding & Grants — Daily KBC Note (2025-12-07)
item.description:
Crowdfunding & Grants: Empowering Knowledge Contributors

Crowdfunding and grants play a vital role in the Knowledge-Based Currency (KBC) ecosystem by providing a means for individuals and organizations to support projects and initiatives that contribute valuable knowledge to the platform. In a traditional sense, crowdfunding involves raising small amounts of money from a large number of people to fund a project or venture. Grants, on the other hand, are non-repayable funds disbursed by organizations, governments, or foundations to support specific activities or initiatives.
